title: aotus franklandii
intro: Aotus franklandii, also known as the Frankland's bush or Frankland's bush-pea, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aotus franklandii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable plant for wound healing and skin conditions. Aotus franklandii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and its leaves and pods are also used in traditional medicine.
